positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial mandala design featuring interwoven elements of cosmic dust, stylized nebulae clouds, and exotic, detailed foliage. The composition must be perfectly centered and circular, utilizing strong, graphic silhouettes and a high-contrast palette of deep midnight blue, glowing gold leaf accents, and vibrant electric teal. The style should mimic intricate modern vector tattoo art combined with bioluminescent, watercolor effects. The edges must be crisp, clean, and flat against a white background, optimized for direct textile printing. Studio lighting, hyperdetailed, perfect symmetry, clean vector lines.
